title: WolfTailUI
body:
![WolfTail UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/453a861c203be6b727991e04a5b19fc3fcaa37a9.png)

# WolfTailUI

**THE PROJECT STILL IN BETA!**

Perhaps these things seem simple, but when you start dev, you encounter difficulties ...

- Post a toast, but here is no ToastManager.
- Alignment widget and slot, with lot of time.
- Render the background, but messed it up because here is too much method.
- Find out method's docs.

But now you have WolfTailUI, you can ...

- Post a toast by simple way.
- Create a UI in the time it takes to brew a cup of coffee.
- Get some good example code for your cool mods.
- And more!
